\tzpentry{ID4507}{Final Acbd Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4507 introduces Final Acbd Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} X_k = \frac{1}{L_k} \sum_{n: n \equiv k \pmod{153600}} w(n)~, \end{equation}
